text: I couldn't sleep worrying about how I've been feeling lately.
label: non-infectious

text: Nothing dramatic, just wanted a routine check.
label: uti/discharge

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 1 day(s) ago, and there's no sign of improvement.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 4 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 4 day(s) like this, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 3 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, though I notice it's not improving.
label: influenza/mild

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 4 day(s) like this, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. Breathing is very laboured.

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s). I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 4 day(s) in. I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 4 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/mild

text: Dangerously high fever, severe muscle pain, utterly exhausted. This has been 9 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 3 day(s).
label: influenza/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 3 day(s) — nothing terrible yet. My heart feels a little fast.
label: influenza/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 6 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 9 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 9 day(s) now. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 9 day(s) and scared, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/severe
